description: Formulates the LCS grid evaluation as a first-passage percolation problem on a directed grid graph. Edge weights are derived from match/mismatch indicators, translating the problem into finding the fastest path.
analogical_connections: Water seeping through a porous rock, where character matches act as highly permeable channels that accelerate the flow.
implementation_hypothesis: Simulate percolation growth clusters on an NxN grid. Track the bounding box of the wetted region to estimate the asymptotic shape theorem constant.
experiment_seed: Implement the Eden growth model mapped to the LCS grid and measure the aspect ratio of the resulting cluster.
experimental_result: FPP-LCS connection well-documented; no novel bound derived.
